overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing the protagonist running through a historic Middle Eastern city. The character navigates canal-side promenades, crosses wooden bridges, winds through narrow residential alleys, and passes through an ornate city gate into a bustling plaza.

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the canal path, passing market stalls and NPC pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark robes walking ahead along the path

entered.detail: calm water canal running parallel to the walkway
light-colored stone tiles forming the walkway
blue fabric awning shading a market stall
stacks of sandbags piled near building entrances
tall palm tree visible down the path

segments.scene_description: Running along a sunlit canal-side promenade with stone pavement, passing market stalls with blue awnings and sandbag barriers. The water reflects the clear sky while NPCs in robes walk ahead in the same direction.

events.description: steps onto wooden plank bridge over the canal water
steps off wooden bridge back onto stone pavement

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden plank bridge over the canal, moving from stone to wood and back

notable_agents.action: seated NPC resting by the canal water's edge

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a narrow footbridge over the water
thick trunk of a large shade tree overhanging the bridge

segments.scene_description: Crossing a wooden footbridge over the canal, passing under the shade of a large tree. The wooden planks form a temporary walkway over the water before returning to stone pavement alongside the canal.

events.description: turns away from the canal into narrow residential alleyways

agents.ego_description: navigating narrow dirt alleyways, turning corners between residential buildings

entered.detail: tan-colored mud brick structures with small windows
stone stairs leading up the side of a building
decorative wooden lattice work on building facade

segments.scene_description: Navigating narrow dirt alleyways between mud-brick residential buildings, passing under archways and by exterior staircases. The environment shifts from the open waterfront to enclosed residential quarters with dappled sunlight.

events.description: mounted camel rider passes by on the right side
passes through the ornate decorated city gate archway into the plaza

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing through the city gate, entering the open plaza beyond

notable_agents.action: camel rider in green robes passing through the gate
guard in red uniform standing watch near the gate entrance

entered.detail: large ornate stone archway with decorative blue tile patterns
intricate blue and white ceramic tiles framing the gate
tall tower with multiple tiers visible in the distance
colorful fabric awnings shading market stalls in the plaza

segments.scene_description: Approaching an ornate city gate decorated with blue tiles, passing red-uniformed guards and a mounted camel rider. The character runs through the grand archway into a sunlit plaza with a distant minaret tower and market canopies visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open waterfront through enclosed residential quarters and finally into a grand city plaza. It begins along a sunlit canal-side promenade, passing blue-awninged market stalls and pedestrians on stone pavement. As the camera moves forward, the scene transitions across a wooden footbridge shaded by a large tree before shifting away from the water into narrow dirt alleyways flanked by mud-brick buildings and stone archways. The environment then opens up as the camera approaches an ornate gate decorated with blue tiles, passing guards and a mounted camel rider. Finally, the shot glides through the grand archway into a wide, sunlit plaza featuring distant market canopies and a towering minaret.
